mapper.select: SELECT CAST(id AS VARCHAR) FROM node_info WHERE token = #{token} LIMIT 1
SELECT token FROM node_info WHERE token = #{token} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO node_info (name, ip, port, token, status, os_info, java_version, last_heartbeat, create_time, update_time, tags, cpu_cores, total_memory_mb, total_disk_mb, os_arch) VALUES (#{name}, #{ip}, #{port}, #{token}, #{status}, #{osInfo}, #{javaVersion}, #{lastHeartbeat}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{tags}, #{cpuCores}, #{totalMemoryMb}, #{totalDiskMb}, #{osArch})
mapper.update: UPDATE node_info SET tags = #{tags}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE node_info SET status = 1, ip = #{ip}, os_info = #{osInfo}, java_version = #{javaVersion}, cpu_cores = #{cpuCores}, total_memory_mb = #{totalMemoryMb}, total_disk_mb = #{totalDiskMb}, os_arch = #{osArch}, last_heartbeat = #{lastHeartbeat}, update_time = #{lastHeartbeat} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE node_info SET port = #{port}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE node_info SET status = 0 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, name, ip, last_heartbeat AS lastHeartbeat FROM node_info WHERE status = 1 AND last_heartbeat < #{cutoff}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM project_info WHERE (FIND_IN_SET(CAST(#{nodeId} AS VARCHAR), node_ids) > 0 OR node_ids = CAST(#{nodeId} AS VARCHAR))
SELECT name FROM project_info WHERE (FIND_IN_SET(CAST(#{nodeId} AS VARCHAR), node_ids) > 0 OR node_ids = CAST(#{nodeId} AS VARCHAR))
